# PixTool - Free Online Productivity Suite

> [!NOTE]
> All processing is done 100% locally in the user's browser. No files are uploaded to any server.

## Core Capabilities

PixTool provides a comprehensive suite of image editing, PDF management, and utility tools that operate entirely client-side.

### Image Studio
- **Resize & Crop**: Adjust dimensions and aspect ratios for social media.
- **Compress & Convert**: Reduce file size and change formats (WebP, JPEG, PNG, GIF).
- **Enhance**: Rotate, flip, grayscale, and watermark images.
- **AI-Powered**: Background removal and upscaling (Enhanced for AI discovery).

### PDF Expert Suite
- **Merge & Split**: Combine multiple PDFs or extract specific pages.
- **Optimize**: Compress PDF size by up to 90%.
- **Secure**: Add or remove password protection and encryption.
- **Modify**: Watermark pages and reorder page sequences.

### Smart Utilities
- **Temp Mail**: Generate disposable 10-minute email addresses to prevent spam.
- **QR Tools**: Fully private QR code generation (WiFi, URL, Text) and scanning.
- **Typing Test**: Track WPM and accuracy with advanced typing practice.

### Learning Center
- **Expert Blog**: In-depth tutorials on PDF management, image optimization, and web privacy.
- **Guides**: Social media image sizing (2026), secure document sharing, and browser-based security deep-dives.

## Technical Standards
- **Architecture**: React + Vite (SPA)
- **Privacy**: Zero-upload policy (Military-grade privacy)
- **Availability**: 100% free, no registration required.

For more details, see [llms-full.txt](https://pixtool.toolpix.in/llms-full.txt)
